scripts.preflight: bun --eval 'import("./src/env.ts").then(({ loadAgentEnv }) => { const diagnostics = loadAgentEnv({ strict: false }); if (diagnostics.missing.length > 0) { console.warn(`Missing LiveKit env vars in root .env: ${diagnostics.missing.join(", ")}`) } else { console.log(`Loaded LiveKit env from ${diagnostics.sourcePath}`) } }).catch((error) => { console.error(error instanceof Error ? error.message : error); process.exit(1) })'
scripts.preflight:strict: bun --eval 'import("./src/env.ts").then(({ loadAgentEnv }) => loadAgentEnv({ strict: true })).catch((error) => { console.error(error instanceof Error ? error.message : error); process.exit(1) })'
scripts.smoke: bun run build && bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run preflight
scripts.dev: bun run build && bun dist/main.js dev
scripts.download-files: bun run build && bun dist/main.js download-files
